query: You are prepping an Apple earnings pre-read for the CIO. Pull exactly the latest 3 annual income statements for Apple so we can compare top-line and margin trend.
Risk team is checking Microsoft's near-term balance-sheet resilience ahead of guidance. Return the latest 4 quarterly balance sheets for Microsoft.
Investment memo needs Tesla cash quality rather than accrual earnings. Fetch the latest 3 annual cash flow statements for Tesla.
Trader asked for an immediate spot check before entering an order in Nvidia. What is the current stock price right now?
For a January performance recap, retrieve Tesla daily prices from 2025-01-01 to 2025-01-31.
Create a same-day headline brief for Apple and include recent company news items.
Compliance wants Apple's most recent annual SEC reports only. List the latest 5 filings of type 10-K.
For a forward-looking valuation pass, pull the latest 3 annual analyst estimates for Apple.
Quant PM wants Microsoft's ratio trajectory quarter by quarter. Return the latest 4 quarterly financial metrics for Microsoft.
Before comparing semiconductor names, grab a one-shot fundamentals snapshot for Nvidia.
Research note needs Tesla revenue mix evolution at annual granularity. Retrieve the latest 2 annual segmented revenues for Tesla.
Before extracting any section, verify what can be pulled from a 10-K. List available filing items for filing type 10-K.
From Apple's annual filing dated 2024-11-01, extract the Risk Factors section from its 10-K.
Build a quick issuer profile card for Microsoft by retrieving company facts.
